description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the haskell:8.0.2 Docker image, runs `cabal update`, `cabal install --enable-tests`, `./site configure`, `./site make`, and `./site build`, and stores the generated site files as artifacts named `${CI_PROJECT_NAME}__${CI_COMMIT_TAG}__${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}__${CI_COMMIT_SHA}` from the `_site/*` path. In the deploy stage add a job named deploy that uses the cgswong/aws:latest image, runs only on the master branch, sets the variable S3_BUCKET to `blog-rekahsoft-s3bucket-7pigtftqm4v8`, and executes `aws s3 sync _site/ s3://$S3_BUCKET` to publish the site to the specified S3 bucket, with an environment called "Rekahsoft Blog" pointing to http://blog.rekahsoft.com. Also define a global variable AWS_DEFAULT_REGION set to us-east-1.
